mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO OTS_SLIP_RELATION (结算单编号, 结算单单号, 总磅单编号, 总磅单单号, 创建时间, version) VALUES
(#{item.settlementId}, #{item.settlementNo}, #{item.slipId}, #{item.slipCode}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM OTS_SLIP_RELATION WHERE 结算单编号 = #{settlementId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM OTS_SLIP_RELATION WHERE 结算单编号 = #{settlementId}
SELECT 关联编号 AS relationId, 结算单编号 AS settlementId, 结算单单号 AS settlementNo, 总磅单编号 AS slipId, 总磅单单号 AS slipCode, 创建时间 AS createTime FROM OTS_SLIP_RELATION WHERE 结算单编号 = #{settlementId} ORDER BY 创建时间 DESC
